scripts.docs:dev: bun run docs:collect && vitepress dev docs
scripts.docs:build: bun run docs:collect && vitepress build docs
scripts.lint: eslint packages/ts/src/ packages/node/src/ packages/vue/src/ packages/nuxt/src/ packages/express/src/ packages/fastify/src/ packages/h3/src/ packages/hono/src/
scripts.lint:fix: eslint --fix packages/ts/src/ packages/node/src/ packages/vue/src/ packages/nuxt/src/ packages/express/src/ packages/fastify/src/ packages/h3/src/ packages/hono/src/
